name: URL Pattern Filter
description: Filter URLs using regex include/exclude patterns and optional HTTP status code validation. Supports presets for common entity types (Operator, Affiliate, B2B). Status check sends HEAD requests and automatically retries 403/429/503 URLs with a headless browser (time-budgeted) to detect bot-protection false positives.
usage_notes: Run after url-dedup and url-canonicalizer. Use exclude_patterns to remove known junk paths (/wp-admin/, /cart/, /login/). check_status_codes sends HEAD requests and retries 403/429/503 with headless browser for bot-protected sites.

options.name: exclude_patterns
options.label: Exclude URL patterns
options.description: One regex pattern per line. URLs matching any pattern will be removed.

options.name: include_patterns
options.label: Include URL patterns
options.description: One regex pattern per line. If set, only matching URLs are kept.

options.name: check_status_codes
options.label: Check HTTP status codes
options.description: Send HEAD requests to verify URLs return 200. Automatically retries with headless browser for bot-protected sites (403/429/503).
